title: Miss Circle Totem
description: simple pack that turns your totem of undying into Miss Circle from FPE
body:
its miss circle from [fundamental paper education](https://youtu.be/B_UjTv6eH4I?si=deb_TOxw2s9gT-cI) on [kaaatie](https://www.youtube.com/@KatiE18729)'s youtube channel

all this does is turn your totem of undying into miss circle

i love miss circle so i made this
